name: Phase 1d: Click interactive elements - button, radio, checkbox, img, svg (baseline_830)
description: Tests click hit-testing on interactive and replaced elements. Button text 'Click Me' center (61,27). Radio label text 'Option A' center (52,59), 'Option B' (144,59). Checkbox label text 'Check 1' center (51,85). Image center (50,145), SVG center (135,145). Clicking replaced elements (img, svg) clears caret (browser behavior). Outside body clears caret. Body height=438, outside at y=470.

events.message: --- B. Image click (replaced element, no text) ---
--- B1. Click image center (50, 145) - replaced element, no caret ---
--- B2. Click image top-left (12, 117) - replaced element, no caret ---
--- C. SVG click (replaced element, no text) ---
--- C1. Click SVG center (135, 145) - replaced element, no caret ---
--- D1. Click radio label text 'Option A' (52, 59) ---
--- D2. Click radio label text 'Option B' (144, 59) ---
--- F. Click outside body to verify caret clears ---
